oversightFindingsState.title: SECURITY DEFINER write_audit_entry callable without project membership check
oversightFindingsState.rationale: Live Security Advisor triage 2026-07-10: public.write_audit_entry(...) is SECURITY DEFINER with search_path=public, EXECUTE granted to authenticated (and anon via PUBLIC). Body only guards auth.uid() IS NOT NULL â€” any signed-in user can insert audit_log rows for arbitrary project_id (audit forgery / data-integrity). Trigger wrappers audit_*_row are lower risk (trigger context). Not a Migration 015 regression; pre-existing from 003_sprint2_audit_and_writes.sql.
oversightFindingsState.targetSprintOrMilestone: Immediate security remediation sprint (non-blocking for unrelated roadmap sprints)
objects: public.write_audit_entry(uuid, text, text, text, text, text, text)
oversightFindingsState.remediation: Add is_project_member(p_project_id) guard (or restrict EXECUTE to service_role / revoke from authenticated/PUBLIC); keep search_path pinned.

Growth payloads (knowledgeTemplateReviewGrowthService, knowledgeTemplatePublicationGrowthService) carry templateRevisionId (Knowledge Library template version) not drawing revision IDs. linkedRevisionIds is optional call-time context for viewer chrome subscription only Ã¢â‚¬â€ not persisted in Memory audit payloads for template review/publication. LessonsLearnedCapture type has no sourceRevisionIds field. drawing_revision_superseded events exist (revisionDetectionService) but no knowledge invalidation/revalidation hook. Cross-ref timeline tracks revisionId but is not linked to knowledge template chain. VariationEvidenceLink supports entityType drawing_revision but knowledge pipeline does not consume it. Superseded drawing invalidation and approved-knowledge revalidation on source revision change are not implemented.

migrationStaging.securityInterrupt: write_audit_entry authenticated EXECUTE without membership guard

securityInterrupts.title: SECURITY DEFINER write_audit_entry callable without project membership check
securityInterrupts.rationale: Live Security Advisor triage 2026-07-10: public.write_audit_entry(...) is SECURITY DEFINER with search_path=public, EXECUTE granted to authenticated (and anon via PUBLIC). Body only guards auth.uid() IS NOT NULL â€” any signed-in user can insert audit_log rows for arbitrary project_id (audit forgery / data-integrity). Trigger wrappers audit_*_row are lower risk (trigger context). Not a Migration 015 regression; pre-existing from 003_sprint2_audit_and_writes.sql.
securityInterrupts.targetSprintOrMilestone: Immediate security remediation sprint (non-blocking for unrelated roadmap sprints)
objects: public.write_audit_entry(uuid, text, text, text, text, text, text)
securityInterrupts.remediation: Add is_project_member(p_project_id) guard (or restrict EXECUTE to service_role / revoke from authenticated/PUBLIC); keep search_path pinned.
